title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.354 - Trooper Wayne W. Allman Memorial Bridge designated for the bridge on State Route 7 in Cass County
text:
227.354.  Trooper Wayne W. Allman Memorial Bridge designated for the bridge on State Route 7 in Cass County. — The bridge on State Route 7 crossing over State Route B in Cass County shall be designated the "Trooper Wayne W. Allman Memorial Bridge".
(L. 2004 H.B. 960 § 227.357)
